name: Performance Stats - Zip and Source Level

content.query:
SELECT
lds.Division
,EOMONTH(lds.EntryDate) as EntryMonth
,cst.Zip
,lds.LeadSubSourceID
,lds.ProductID
,lds.BranchID
,count(distinct lds.LeadID) as LeadCount
,count(distinct lds.CustomerID) as ProspectCount
,sum(case when lds.ApptSet = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as ApptSet
,sum(case when lds.NetIssued = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as NetIssue
,sum(case when lds.Sat = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as Demo
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0
    else 1
end) as NetSold
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end) as NetSalesAmount
,sum(job.GrossAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
,count(distinct job.JobID) as JobCount
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
inner join [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
left join [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
on lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
on job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
on jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
WHERE
lds.EntryDate >= '2021-01-01'
group by 
lds.Division
,EOMONTH(lds.EntryDate)
,cst.Zip
,lds.LeadSubSourceID
,lds.ProductID
,lds.BranchID
